name.ja: <ruby>蒼<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby>の<ruby>防<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby><ruby>衛<rt>えい</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster, shuffle 2 WATER Attribute Warrior Type monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck.

effect.en: Choose up to 2 Attack Position Celestial Warrior and/or Warrior Type monsters on your field. This turn, those monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. Then, you can Set 1 "Fusion" from your Graveyard in your Spell & Trap Zone.
